'''dadhocho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:crabstone|crabstone]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-dh-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:crabstone|crabstone]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dadhocho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dædhecheth|dædhecheth]] || [[word:dædhechej|dædhechej]] || [[word:dædhechesh|dædhechesh]] || [[word:dædheche|dædheche]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dadhodhochoth|dadhodhochoth]] || [[word:dadhodhochoj|dadhodhochoj]] || [[word:dadhodhochosh|dadhodhochosh]] || [[word:dadhodhocho|dadhodhocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dadhochoth|dadhochoth]] || [[word:dadhochoj|dadhochoj]] || [[word:dadhochosh|dadhochosh]] || [[word:dadhocho|dadhocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dadhofchoth|dadhofchoth]] || [[word:dadhofchoj|dadhofchoj]] || [[word:dadhofchosh|dadhofchosh]] || [[word:dadhofchof|dadhofchof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dadhochotho|dadhochotho]] || [[word:dadhochojo|dadhochojo]] || [[word:dadhochosho|dadhochosho]] || [[word:dadhochoko|dadhochoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dadhochoth|dadhochoth]] || [[word:dadhochoj|dadhochoj]] || [[word:dadhochosh|dadhochosh]] || [[word:dadhocho|dadhocho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dadhochothol|dadhochothol]] || [[word:dadhochojol|dadhochojol]] || [[word:dadhochoshol|dadhochoshol]] || [[word:dadhochokol|dadhochokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dadhochothotho|dadhochothotho]] || [[word:dadhochojojo|dadhochojojo]] || [[word:dadhochoshosho|dadhochoshosho]] || [[word:dadhochoko|dadhochoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dadhochothon|dadhochothon]] || [[word:dadhochojon|dadhochojon]] || [[word:dadhochoshon|dadhochoshon]] || [[word:dadhochokon|dadhochokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dadhochothoro|dadhochothoro]] || [[word:dadhochojoro|dadhochojoro]] || [[word:dadhochoshoro|dadhochoshoro]] || [[word:dadhochokoro|dadhochokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
